  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

P9X X73 serial

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "54FF00",
    "sentbytes": "14FF00",
    "name": "CDI DTC reset",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "CDIinit": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Group of DTC GDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "CDIinitOK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DTC for cleardiagOK": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "51",
    "sentbytes": "1100",
    "name": "ECUReset teach-in",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "ECUR": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ResetMode": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "ECUROK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Reset Status": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 17,
    "replybytes": "61BD",
    "sentbytes": "21BD",
    "name": "Frame 30 ftdv1.9",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Booleen indicating whether eeprom vl3 failure": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "BOUTONRV": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Byte upon reception of AIRBAG_crash frame coherent": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CC on off switch pressed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CFGACCRV": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Close brake switch boolean": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Clutch contact boolean": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CONFMUX1": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CONFMUX2": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CONFMUX3": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "connection state with UCEMUX1  INJ": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "connection state with UCEMUX10": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "connection state with UCEMUX11": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 4,

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true

        "bitoffset": 4,

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true

        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "connection state with UCEMUX8  CLIM": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "connection state with UCEMUX9  BVA": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CONTACRV": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Cruise or Limit speed selected by driver": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation because set speed ratio is incoherent": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to AGB at neutral detection": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to ASR request": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to brake application": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to CC SL failure detection": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to engine control problem": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to engine gearbox disconnection": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to invalid vehicle speed": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to out of date vehicle speed": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Deactivation due to suspend switch press": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DESACARV": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DESACNRV": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Detection of 1 frame ACC": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_crach frame": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ECU protected": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure present on both brake contacts": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure present on ESP function": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure present on one of the two brake contacts": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure present on steering wheel control": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure recorded on both brake contacts": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure recorded on ESP function": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure recorded on one of the two brake contact": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure recorded on steering wheel control": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FLGPMRV": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FLGPPRV": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FONCTDIV": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Information on ESP presence detection": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "LocalIDdiag OK": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "OnOff switch incoherence failure present": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "OnOff switch incoherence failure recorded": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Open brake switch boolean": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "RDBLIdiag OK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "resume switch pressed ": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "set and minus switch pressed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "set and plus switch pressed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SL on off switch pressed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "State change detection clutch contact": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "State change detection LV position with security on config detect": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "State change detection one of 4 steering wheel switches": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "State change detection RV position with security on config detect": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "State change detection stop brake contact": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "suspend switch pressed ": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Verlog3 code has been learnt": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "1200041000",

    "minbytes": 23,

    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Fault type": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Memorized failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Present failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Status DTC global": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 24,
    "replybytes": "57",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "RSODTC DTC reading",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Group of DTC all the failure": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "RSODTC": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "DTC_1": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTC_2": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTC_3": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "DTC_4": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "DTC_5": {
        "firstbyte": 16
      },
      "DTC_6": {
        "firstbyte": 19
      },
      "DTC_7": {
        "firstbyte": 22
      },
      "DTC_8": {
        "firstbyte": 25
      },
      "Number of failures": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "RSODTCOK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_1": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_2": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_3": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_4": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_5": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_6": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_7": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Status DTC_8": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "endian": "Little"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "C1",
    "sentbytes": "81",
    "name": "SComm fast init",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "start communication": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Key word 1": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Key word 2": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Start comm OK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "replybytes": "50",
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "SDSession",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Diag mode": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SDS": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "SDSOK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "replybytes": "6782",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "278200000000",
    "name": "Security AXS confirm of unlock",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "access mode confirmtion": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "security KEY": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SecurityAccess RequestNo2 seviceID": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "access mode confirmation OK": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SecurityAccess RequestNo2 seviceID OK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 6,
    "replybytes": "6781",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "2781",
    "name": "Security AXS unlock",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "access mode": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SecurityAccess RequestNo1 seriveID": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "access mode OK": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "security SEED": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SecurityAccess RequestNo1 seriveID OK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "71",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "310000",
    "name": "SRBLI start routine",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine entry parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Routine number": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "StaRBLI": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine launched": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Routine launched  status": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "StaBLIOK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "72",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "320000",
    "name": "SRBLI stop routine",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "routine number to stop": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Routine output parameter stop": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "StoRBLI": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine stopped": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Routine stopped status": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "StoRBLIOK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "3BD100",

    "deny_sds": [],

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      }

        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "7B",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3B8100000000000000000000000000000000000000",

    "deny_sds": [],

        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
